title: Draft a calm reply
body: Draft a calm, professional reply in British English. Keep it clear, polite, and easy to copy into an email.

title: Summarise key points
body: Summarise the key facts, actions, dates, and risks in short plain English. Use short paragraphs.

title: Turn notes into action list
body: Turn the context into a short action list with owners, follow-ups, and any missing information that should be clarified.
